channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: GeForce NOW lands in India, but cloud gaming just got real for budget players. PRAGMATA drops day one, proof that streaming hardware matters less than eve... https://Blockchain.News/news/nvidia-geforce-now-india-expansion-pragmata-launch #GeForceNOW #PRAGMATA #CloudGaming
